user.title: Add PhoneSense phone
user.description: Enter the stable device ID shown by the PhoneSense app.

abort.already_configured: This PhoneSense phone is already configured.

stale_device.title: PhoneSense phone is stale
stale_device.description: {device_name} has not checked in within its expected interval.

permissions_required.title: PhoneSense permissions need attention
permissions_required.description: {device_name} reports blocked capabilities: {capabilities}. Open PhoneSense and grant or intentionally disable the affected permissions.

incompatible_protocol.title: PhoneSense protocol upgrade required
incompatible_protocol.description: {device_name} cannot communicate with this integration ({error}). Update the PhoneSense app or integration so both support the same protocol major version.
